title: Tata Consultancy Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Tata Consultancy Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Consultancy Services:
Tata Consultancy Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services!
